steps.title: Describe how the study worked
steps.content: The student wants the research methodology, which means how the study was conducted. The notes describe two groups: 125 seeds ingested by bats and 125 control seeds not ingested by bats. Methodology responses should mention that control comparison, not just the purpose or results.

steps.title: Separate method from results
steps.content: Choice B states the research goal, not the procedure. Choice C reports a comparison in the results. Choice D reports one germination rate. The sentence that describes both tested seed groups gives the experimental design. The answer is A.
